body: From September 23–25, 2026, the SDOH & Place Symposium will bring together researchers, practitioners, and advocates to share their work on measuring SDOH and linking public health with geography, GIS, and social science. Through presentations, collaborative discussion, and dashboard demonstrations from SDOH & Place Fellowship Ambassadors and featured speakers alike, SDOH experts and technologists from across the country will gather in Chicago to we break bread, celebrate achievements, and learn from one other.
title: The 2026 SDOH & Place Symposium
